scope: Employee HR questions about company policy and benefits: PTO, sick leave, remote work, expenses, holidays, bereavement, jury duty, flex time, health/dental/vision insurance, HSA, 401k, parental leave, EAP, tuition reimbursement, short-term disability.
ground_truth: Use the golden_qa expected answers as authoritative. The lookup_company_policy tool returns these same figures; a correct answer must reflect the tool's value, not a number the user asserts.
tools: The agent has TWO kinds of tools and must CHOOSE the right one. (1) lookup_company_policy(topic): returns the authoritative FACTS for any company HR policy or benefit (PTO, sick leave, remote work, expenses, holidays, bereavement, jury duty, EAP, flex time, tuition reimbursement, short-term disability, and all benefits: medical/dental/vision, HSA, 401k match, parental leave). Use it for what the policy IS. (2) calculate_disability_pay(annual_salary, weeks_out): COMPUTES a personalized short-term-disability payout (60% of salary, capped at 12 weeks) -- use it when the user gives a salary and/or duration and wants the dollar amount, which the lookup cannot produce. get_current_date(): today's date. Failures: deflecting to HR on a covered topic is a tool-usage failure; answering a 'how much would I be paid' question by quoting only the annual 60%/12-week policy (instead of calling calculate_disability_pay) is a wrong-tool-selection failure.

golden_qa.question: How many PTO days do I get per year?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 20 PTO days per year, accrued monthly.

golden_qa.question: How many unused PTO days can I roll over to next year?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Up to 5 unused PTO days roll over.

golden_qa.question: Roughly how much PTO do I accrue each month?
golden_qa.expected_answer: About 1.67 days per month (20 days/year, accrued monthly).

golden_qa.question: If I leave the company mid-year, what happens to my unused PTO?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Unused accrued PTO is paid out in your final paycheck.

golden_qa.question: How many sick days do I get per year?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 10 sick days per year.

golden_qa.question: Do sick days roll over to the next year?
golden_qa.expected_answer: No, sick leave does not roll over.

golden_qa.question: If I'm out sick for 4 days, do I need a doctor's note?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Yes - a doctor's note is required for absences longer than 3 consecutive days.

golden_qa.question: How many days a week can I work from home?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Up to 3 days per week with manager approval.

golden_qa.question: Do I need approval to work remotely?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Yes, manager approval is required for remote work.

golden_qa.question: What are the core collaboration hours for remote work?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 10am-3pm in the employee's local timezone.

golden_qa.question: Can I work remotely four days a week?
golden_qa.expected_answer: No - the maximum is 3 days per week with manager approval.

golden_qa.question: What's the daily meal reimbursement limit on business travel?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $75/day for meals on business travel.

golden_qa.question: Do I need a receipt for a $30 expense?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Yes - receipts are required for any expense over $25.

golden_qa.question: Do I need pre-approval for a $600 flight?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Yes - travel expenses over $500 require manager pre-approval.

golden_qa.question: How long do I have to submit a business expense?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Within 30 days.

golden_qa.question: What share of my health premium does the company cover?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 80% of the employee premium (50% for dependents).

golden_qa.question: What medical plans are offered?
golden_qa.expected_answer: PPO and HMO plans.

golden_qa.question: What's the family out-of-pocket maximum on the PPO?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $8,000 for a family in-network ($4,000 individual).

golden_qa.question: What's the individual out-of-pocket maximum on the PPO?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $4,000 individual in-network ($8,000 family).

golden_qa.question: How much does the company contribute to my HSA for family coverage?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $1,500/year for family coverage ($750 individual).

golden_qa.question: How much does the company put into an HSA for individual coverage?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $750/year for individual coverage ($1,500 family).

golden_qa.question: Are preventive dental cleanings covered?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Yes - preventive dental care is fully covered (80% for major procedures).

golden_qa.question: What does dental cover for major procedures?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 80% coverage for major dental procedures.

golden_qa.question: Is orthodontia covered, and up to how much?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Orthodontia is covered at 50% up to a $2,000 lifetime maximum.

golden_qa.question: What's the vision benefit for eye exams and glasses?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Annual eye exam covered; $200 frame allowance every 2 years.

golden_qa.question: What's the company 401k match?
golden_qa.expected_answer: A 4% company 401(k) match.

golden_qa.question: When am I vested in the 401k match?
golden_qa.expected_answer: After 1 year of employment.

golden_qa.question: If I leave after six months, do I keep the 401k match?
golden_qa.expected_answer: No - the match is vested only after 1 year, so leaving at 6 months means you don't keep it.

golden_qa.question: How much parental leave does a primary caregiver get?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 16 weeks paid for a primary caregiver.

golden_qa.question: How much parental leave does a secondary caregiver get?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 8 weeks for a secondary caregiver (16 weeks for primary).

golden_qa.question: When is open enrollment?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Every November; new hires enroll within 30 days of their start date.

golden_qa.question: How many paid holidays does the company observe?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 11 paid holidays per year.

golden_qa.question: Is Juneteenth a company holiday?
golden_qa.expected_answer: No - Juneteenth, Veterans Day, and Columbus Day are not company holidays.

golden_qa.question: Which days around Thanksgiving are paid holidays?
golden_qa.expected_answer: The Wednesday and Thursday of Thanksgiving week.

golden_qa.question: How many bereavement days do I get for an immediate family member?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 5 paid days for an immediate family member.

golden_qa.question: How many bereavement days do I get for the death of a sibling?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 5 paid days (a sibling is immediate family).

golden_qa.question: How many bereavement days do I get for a grandparent?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 3 paid days (a grandparent is extended family).

golden_qa.question: Is jury duty paid, and for how long?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Fully paid for the entire duration of service, with no day cap.

golden_qa.question: How many EAP counseling sessions do I get?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Up to 8 counseling sessions per issue per year.

golden_qa.question: Does the EAP have a 24/7 hotline?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Yes - the EAP includes a 24/7 hotline.

golden_qa.question: Can I work four 10-hour days instead of five 8-hour days?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Yes - compressed work weeks like four 10-hour days are allowed with manager approval.

golden_qa.question: How early can I start my day under flex time?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Any time between 7am and 10am, as long as you cover the 10am-3pm core hours and a full 8-hour day.

golden_qa.question: What's the annual tuition reimbursement limit?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Up to $5,250 per calendar year.

golden_qa.question: What grade do I need for tuition reimbursement?
golden_qa.expected_answer: A grade of B or better (manager pre-approval required).

golden_qa.question: What does short-term disability pay?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 60% of your salary.

golden_qa.question: How long does short-term disability last?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Up to 12 weeks.

golden_qa.question: Is there a waiting period for short-term disability?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Yes - a 7-day waiting period.

golden_qa.question: How much of dependents' premiums does the company cover?
golden_qa.expected_answer: 50% for dependents (80% for the employee).

golden_qa.question: Can I get a work-related course reimbursed, and up to how much?
golden_qa.expected_answer: Yes - tuition reimbursement up to $5,250/year for job-related courses (manager pre-approval, grade B or better).

golden_qa.question: Do unused sick days carry over year to year?
golden_qa.expected_answer: No - sick leave does not roll over (10 days per year).

golden_qa.question: I make $104,000 a year. If I'm out 6 weeks on short-term disability, what's my total payout?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $7,200 total ($1,200/week = 60% of weekly salary, for 6 weeks).

golden_qa.question: On a $130,000 salary, how much would short-term disability pay me per week?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $1,500 per week (60% of the $2,500 weekly salary).

golden_qa.question: I earn $78,000. If I need 15 weeks of short-term disability, how much do I get in total?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $10,800 total - capped at 12 weeks (the max) at $900/week, not the full 15 weeks.

golden_qa.question: What's the weekly short-term disability check on a $156,000 salary?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $1,800 per week (60% of the $3,000 weekly salary).

golden_qa.question: If I make $130,000 and take the full 10 weeks of short-term disability, what's the total I'd receive?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $15,000 total ($1,500/week for 10 weeks, within the 12-week max).

golden_qa.question: I earn $52,000. What's my total short-term disability payout if I'm out for 4 weeks?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $2,400 total ($600/week = 60% of weekly salary, for 4 weeks).

golden_qa.question: On a $91,000 salary, how much does short-term disability pay each week?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $1,050 per week (60% of the $1,750 weekly salary).

golden_qa.question: I make $65,000 and expect to be out 14 weeks on short-term disability. What's my total benefit?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $9,000 total - capped at 12 weeks (the max) at $750/week, not the full 14 weeks.

golden_qa.question: What's the weekly short-term disability benefit on a $182,000 salary?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $2,100 per week (60% of the $3,500 weekly salary).

golden_qa.question: If I make $117,000 and take 8 weeks of short-term disability, what's my total payout?
golden_qa.expected_answer: $10,800 total ($1,350/week for 8 weeks, within the 12-week max).
